Setlist
New Shows Added to the Almanac (updated 8.4.25)
Nearly every Dave Matthews Band performance since 1995 has been documented in many different ways and only individual member performances either solo or with other musicians tend to surface in this most recent era. However, older performances often happened with little to no public documentation available to the public. This list is a compilation of the additions of these shows as we find and identify them.

There are various ways that we come across new shows previously unknown to the site. Sometimes a recording of a performance surfaces with a date attached to it. Sometimes a recording has no date to it and we have to listen to chatter during the show to try to figure out when it was. Recently, the most common method to finding these unknown shows has been to search databases of publications such as local newspapers to find concert listings and reviews in the local area of these articles.

Beginning late 2022, we have notated the date in which a new show is entered into the site.
Show Date Artist Venue Name and Location Date added Show Note Source Info
